metadata.description: The PM IQ plugin collection for project management aligned with PMBOK 8

plugins.name: pm-project-core
plugins.description: Core project artifacts, schedules, WBS, and milestones for predictive, adaptive, and hybrid methodologies.

plugins.name: pm-value-and-performance
plugins.description: Value delivery, EVM (Earned Value Management), KPIs, and OKR alignment for measuring project performance.

plugins.name: pm-risk-and-change
plugins.description: Formal risk registers, change control (CCB), issue tracking, and contingency reserve management.

plugins.name: pm-resource-and-procurement
plugins.description: Resource allocation, procurement tracking, contractor performance, and material delivery schedules.

plugins.name: pm-quality-and-deliverables
plugins.description: Quality management, deliverable acceptance, inspection results, and non-conformance reports (NCR).

plugins.name: pm-agent-toolkit
plugins.description: Toolkit for PMO analysts to build custom declarative agents, dashboard widgets, and tailor PM processes to project complexity.

plugins.name: pm-stakeholder-and-team
plugins.description: Stakeholder engagement analysis, communication patterns, team health monitoring, and meeting effectiveness.
